# Signetry Product Intelligence Records (PIR)

An open registry of structured product facts, indexed by GTIN.
Total: 368 products across 7 brands.

## How to access

Individual record by GTIN:
  https://pir.signetry.ai/records/{gtin}.json

Full catalog index:
  https://pir.signetry.ai/catalog.json

JSON Schema:
  https://pir.signetry.ai/schema/pir.v1.json

Browse all records:
  https://github.com/jb-au/pir/tree/main/records

## Record structure

Each JSON record contains:
- gtin: Global Trade Item Number (barcode)
- sku: Manufacturer model code
- brand: Brand name (manufacturer for wrapped products)
- manufacturer: Who made the product (present on wrapped/OEM products)
- base_model: Underlying platform model (for branded wraps)
- branding: { type, wrap_brand, licensor } for licensed wraps
- category: Product category
- facts{}: Structured specs (capacity_litres, weight_kg, noise_db, etc.)
- qa[]: Pre-answered questions citing fact keys
- documents[]: Spec sheets, manuals, brochures (URLs)
- sellers[]: Authorized retailers with regions
- status: { brand_certified, submitted_by, submitted_date }

## Trust model
- brand_certified: true — Brand verified facts via DNS domain ownership
- brand_certified: false — Submitted by retailer, source recorded

## Known data gaps
- 6 GTIN collisions in BFA feed (Shopify data entry errors)
- 9 Lecavist products pending GTINs (stored as sku-{SKU}.json)
- 2 Schmick products (SK116R-SS, SK126L-SD) missing enrichment (404 on product pages)

## Contributing
Records stored as {gtin}.json in /records/. Submit via pull request.
Pending-GTIN records use sku-{SKU}.json naming.
